2026-27 Men's Basketball Roster

20 Marley Baah-Yeboah

  • Position G
  • Height 6-4
  • Class Junior
  • Hometown Lakeville, Minn.
  • High School Lakeville South HS
  • Bio
  • Stats
  • Historical

Biography

2024-25: Redshirt season…

Prep: Marley Baah-Yeboah is a 6-foot-4, 200-pound guard out of Lakeville South High School. He is a 2-year starter and team captain for the Cougars under the direction of head coach Joe Janquart. Last season, Baah-Yeboah averaged 13.0 points, 6.0 rebounds, and 1.5 assists per game. In addition, he is a member of the D1 Minnesota AAU program. He is the son of Felix Baah-Yeboah.
